g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does AXIOM ingest OHLCV market data for the agent pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does AXIOM process live news stream and sentiment for the agent?')
sendPrompt('How does the AXIOM agent handle multi-turn natural language queries?')
sendPrompt('What is the ReAct loop and how should I implement it in the AXIOM orchestrator agent?')

sendPrompt('How should I build the Risk analyst specialist agent for portfolio stress testing?')
sendPrompt('How should I build the Macro analyst specialist agent for earnings and rate analysis?')
sendPrompt('How do I write a SQL query tool for the AXIOM specialist agents to query axiom_knowledge.db?')
sendPrompt('How do I give AXIOM specialist agents a web search tool for live news?')
sendPrompt('How do I add a code execution tool for backtesting in AXIOM agents?')
sendPrompt('How do I add a broker API tool to AXIOM for live order execution?')
sendPrompt('How does multi-agent consensus and confidence calibration work in AXIOM response synthesis?')
